name: Spicy Applesauce Brownies
recipeIngredient: 2 ounces Unsweetened Chocolate, melted and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the unsweetened chocolate and let it cool.
2. Cream together the shortening and granulated sugar until smooth.
3. Add the eggs, one at a time, to the mixture and beat well after each addition.
4. Mix in the cooled melted chocolate, applesauce, and vanilla extract.
5. In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, salt, and ground cinnamon.
6. Gradually add the dry ingredients into the wet mixture, stirring until just combined.
7. Fold in the chopped walnuts.
8. Pour the batter into a greased 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan.
9. Bake at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) for 25 minutes or until set.
10. Prepare the glaze by combining sifted powdered sugar, ground cinnamon, and enough milk to reach a drizzling consistency.
11. Drizzle the glaze over slightly warm brownies.
12. Allow the brownies to cool completely before cutting into bars.
Makes 36 brownies.
